'''âm-y-s-f''' ('''kamaysefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monkey|monkey]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-y-s-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monkey|monkey]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-y-s-f
|-
! Lemma
| kamaysefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimaysefoko|thimaysefoko]] || [[word:jimaysefoko|jimaysefoko]] || [[word:shimaysefoko|shimaysefoko]] || [[word:kimaysefoko|kimaysefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumaysefoko|thuthumaysefoko]] || [[word:jujumaysefoko|jujumaysefoko]] || [[word:shushumaysefoko|shushumaysefoko]] || [[word:kukumaysefoko|kukumaysefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomaysefoko|thomaysefoko]] || [[word:jomaysefoko|jomaysefoko]] || [[word:shomaysefoko|shomaysefoko]] || [[word:komaysefoko|komaysefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmaysefoko|thĂŠmaysefoko]] || [[word:jĂŠmaysefoko|jĂŠmaysefoko]] || [[word:shĂŠmaysefoko|shĂŠmaysefoko]] || [[word:kĂŠmaysefoko|kĂŠmaysefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
